summary: Completed frontend testing of YOUR NEXT MOVES section with AI-generated recommendations from momentum-recap API (iteration 229). All 13 features verified and working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: YOUR NEXT MOVES section testing complete (iteration 229). All features verified: [1] YOUR NEXT MOVES section renders 4 cards from recap priorities API data. [2] Top priority card shows 'NEEDS YOUR ATTENTION NOW' badge in red with alert icon (AlertCircle). [3] Secondary cards (2) show 'SECONDARY' badge in orange with chevron icon (ChevronRight). [4] Watch card shows 'WATCH' badge in gray with eye icon (Eye). [5] Top priority card shows urgency note 'This is your most important action right now'. [6] Each card shows action text (e.g., 'Re-engage Emory University') and reason (e.g., '→ No activity for 8 days — re-engage within 24–48 hours'). [7] Cards are clickable and navigate to /pipeline/{program_id}. [8] Where you're gaining traction section shows Heated Up (3): Stanford University (Campus Visit), University of Florida (In Conversation), UCLA (Added). [9] Holding Steady (1): Creighton University (Added). [10] Each traction item shows school name, stage label, and action guidance. [11] What's driving your pipeline right now section shows 5 AI insight bullets. [12] Hero carousel still works above YOUR NEXT MOVES section. [13] Priority/Pipeline view toggle still works. [14] Pipeline Summary card (MomentumInsight) still visible at top with breakdown pills.
